{"file_path": "/home/nahom/.claude/plans/bubbly-exploring-beacon.md", "content": "# Plan: Fix API Contract Mismatches

## Context

An audit found blocker-level drift between frontend API endpoint wrappers and backend route definitions across four modules. The frontend is calling paths/verbs that do not exist on the backend. The fix adds backward-compatible alias routes on the backend only — all existing canonical routes are kept intact. No frontend changes required.

---

## Complete Mismatch Inventory

### Analytics (`analytics.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /definitions/:id` | `PUT /definitions/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `POST /reports` | `POST /reports/generate` | Add POST alias (must be after `/reports/generate`) |
| `POST /reports/:id/shares` | `POST /reports/:id/share` | Add POST alias |
| `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` | `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId` | Add DELETE alias; bridge `shareId→userId` param |
| `GET /schedules`, `GET /schedules/:id`, `POST /schedules`, `PATCH /schedules/:id`, `DELETE /schedules/:id` | None (only `GET /schedule-executions` exists) | Add schedules CRUD routes backed by the existing definition controller + new `listSchedules`/`deleteDefinition` service functions |

### Messaging (`messaging.routes.ts`)
Frontend prefixes all message routes with `/messages/`; backend routes are flat:
| Frontend calls | Backend has |
|---|---|
| `POST /messages` | `POST /enqueue` |
| `GET /messages` | `GET /` |
| `GET /messages/:id` | `GET /:id` |
| `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /:id/delivery` |

Fix: add four `/messages/*` aliases pointing to same controllers.

### Test-Center (`test-center.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /sites/:id` | `PUT /sites/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `GET /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `GET /rooms?siteId=` | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.query.siteId` |
| `POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `POST /rooms` (siteId in body) | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.body.siteId` before `validate()` |
| `PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `PUT /rooms/:id` | Add nested PATCH; middleware sets `req.params.id = req.params.roomId` |
| `DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `DELETE /rooms/:id` | Add nested DELETE; bridge roomId→id |
| `GET /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `GET /seats?roomId=` | Add nested route; inject `req.query.roomId` |
| `POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `POST /seats` (roomId in body) | Add nested route; inject `req.body.roomId` |
| `PATCH /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | `PUT /seats/:id` | Add nested PATCH; bridge seatId→id |
| `DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | No delete seat endpoint | Add new `DELETE /seats/:id` route + `deleteSeat` controller/service |
| `PATCH /equipment/:id` | `PUT /equipment/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `PATCH /sessions/:id` | No general update (only cancel) | Add PATCH alias → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:id` | No delete session endpoint | Add DELETE → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` | `DELETE /sessions/:id/register` (reads `?userId=`) | Add nested route + `cancelRegistrationById` service method that looks up registration by ID |

### Notifications
| Issue | Fix |
|---|---|
| Frontend sends `{ until: string }` for snooze; backend schema requires `snoozedUntil` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept both keys, transform to `snoozedUntil` |
| `PATCH /templates/:id` | Backend has `PUT /templates/:id` — add PATCH alias |
| `DELETE /templates/:id` | No delete endpoint — add DELETE route + `deleteTemplate` controller/service |

---

## Implementation Steps (ordered by dependency)

### 1. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts`

Add two standalone functions before the `analyticsService` export object (line 1031):

```typescript
async function deleteDefinition(id: string) {
  const existing = await prisma.reportDefinition.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) throw new NotFoundError('Report definition not found');
  const definition = await prisma.reportDefinition.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { isActive: false },
  });
  logger.info({ definitionId: id }, 'Report definition soft-deleted');
  return definition;
}

async function listSchedules(query: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) {
  const { skip, take, page, pageSize } = parsePagination(query);
  const where = { isActive: true, frequency: { not: 'ON_DEMAND' as ReportFrequency } };
  const [definitions, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.reportDefinition.findMany({
      where, skip, take, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { _count: { select: { reports: true } } },
    }),
    prisma.reportDefinition.count({ where }),
  ]);
  return { data: definitions, meta: buildMeta(total, page, pageSize) };
}
```

Then add `deleteDefinition` and `listSchedules` to the `analyticsService` export object.

### 2. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts`

Append after the existing `updateDefinition` handler:

```typescript
export const deleteDefinition = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await analyticsService.deleteDefinition(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export const listSchedules = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const result = await analyticsService.listSchedules(req.query as any);
  res.status(200).json(paginated(result.data, result.meta));
});
```

### 3. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts`

Add `NextFunction` to the `express` import. Then add the following compat routes (order matters for the POST /reports alias — it must come after `POST /reports/generate`):

- After `PUT /definitions/:id`: add `PATCH /definitions/:id` → same middleware chain + `controller.updateDefinition`
- After `POST /reports/generate`: add `POST /reports` → same middleware chain + `controller.generateReport`
- After `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId`: add:
  - `POST /reports/:id/shares` → same as `POST /reports/:id/share`
  - `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` → inline middleware sets `req.params.userId = req.params.shareId`, then `controller.revokeShare`
- At end of file (before export), add `GET /schedules` (→ `controller.listSchedules`, analyticsRoles), `GET /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.getDefinition`), `POST /schedules` (→ `controller.createDefinition`, analyticsRoles), `PATCH /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.updateDefinition`, managerRoles), `DELETE /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.deleteDefinition`, managerRoles)

Mark all compat blocks with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation.

### 4. `backend/src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts`

Add a clearly labeled section at end of file (before export) with four aliases:
- `POST /messages` → same middleware as `POST /enqueue`
- `GET /messages` → same middleware as `GET /`
- `GET /messages/:id` → `controller.getMessageStatus`
- `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` → same middleware as `PATCH /:id/delivery`

No new imports needed.

### 5. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts`

Add to the `TestCenterService` class after `updateSeat`:

```typescript
async deleteSeat(id: string) {
  const seat = await prisma.testSeat.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!seat) throw new NotFoundError('Test seat not found');
  await prisma.testSeat.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ seatId: id }, 'Test seat deleted');
}

async cancelRegistrationById(registrationId: string, actorId: string) {
  const registration = await prisma.testRegistration.findUnique({
    where: { id: registrationId },
  });
  if (!registration) throw new NotFoundError('Registration not found');
  return this.cancelRegistration(registration.sessionId, registration.userId, actorId);
}
```

### 6. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.controller.ts`

Append after `updateSeat`:
```typescript
export const deleteSeat = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.deleteSeat(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

Append after `cancelRegistration`:
```typescript
export const cancelRegistrationById = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.cancelRegistrationById(req.params.registrationId, req.userId);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 7. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts`

Add `Request, Response, NextFunction` to the `express` import.

Add compat routes in labeled sections:

**PATCH aliases for flat resources** (after respective PUT blocks):
- `PATCH /sites/:id` → same chain as `PUT /sites/:id` (`updateSite`)
- `PATCH /seats/:id` → same chain as `PUT /seats/:id` (`updateSeat`)
- `PATCH /equipment/:id` → same chain as `PUT /equipment/:id` (`updateEquipment`)

**New flat routes for missing CRUD** (after existing seat routes):
- `DELETE /seats/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN only) → `controller.deleteSeat`

**Session compat routes** (after `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`):
- `PATCH /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`
- `DELETE /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`

**Nested rooms** (new labeled section):
```typescript
// GET /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into query
router.get('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  controller.listRooms);

// POST /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into body BEFORE validate()
router.post('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema }),
  controller.createRoom);

// PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.patch('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateRoomSchema }),
  controller.updateRoom);

// DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.delete('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.deleteRoom);
```

**Nested seats** (new labeled section):
```typescript
router.get('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.listSeats);

router.post('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateSeatSchema }),
  controller.createSeat);

router.patch('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateSeatSchema }),
  controller.updateSeat);

router.delete('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  controller.deleteSeat);
```

**Registration by ID** (after existing `DELETE /sessions/:id/register`):
```typescript
router.delete('/sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId', requireAuth,
  controller.cancelRegistrationById);
```

### 8. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.schemas.ts`

Replace the current `SnoozeNotificationSchema`:

```typescript
export const SnoozeNotificationSchema = z
  .object({
    snoozedUntil: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    until: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  })
  .refine((val) => val.snoozedUntil !== undefined || val.until !== undefined, {
    message: 'Either snoozedUntil or until is required',
  })
  .transform((val) => ({ snoozedUntil: (val.snoozedUntil ?? val.until)! }));
```

The `validate` middleware does `req.body = result.data` after `.safeParse()`, so the controller will always receive `{ snoozedUntil: string }` after the transform. `SnoozeNotificationBody` type inferred from the schema remains `{ snoozedUntil: string }` — controller code unchanged.

### 9. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts`

Add `deleteTemplate` to the `NotificationsService` class (`NotificationTemplate.onDelete: SetNull` on its relations, so hard-delete is safe):

```typescript
async deleteTemplate(id: string) {
  await this.getTemplate(id); // throws NotFoundError if not found
  await prisma.notificationTemplate.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ templateId: id }, 'Notification template deleted');
}
```

### 10. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.controller.ts`

Append after `updateTemplate`:

```typescript
export const deleteTemplate = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await notificationsService.deleteTemplate(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 11. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.routes.ts`

Add after the existing `PUT /templates/:id` block (before `POST /templates/preview`):

```typescript
// COMPAT: frontend calls PATCH /templates/:id
router.patch('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  validate({ body: UpdateTemplateSchema }), controller.updateTemplate);

router.delete('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  controller.deleteTemplate);
```

### 12. `backend/tests/api/helpers/setup.ts`

Add missing mock methods inside the `vi.hoisted()` block:

- `mockAnalyticsServiceObj`: add `deleteDefinition: vi.fn()`, `listSchedules: vi.fn()`
- `mockTestCenterServiceObj`: add `deleteSeat: vi.fn()`, `cancelRegistrationById: vi.fn()`
- `mockNotificationsServiceObj`: add `deleteTemplate: vi.fn()`

### 13–16. Test files

Add `describe` blocks to existing test files (append, do not replace):

**`analytics.test.ts`**: Tests for `PATCH /definitions/:id`, `POST /reports` (compat), `POST /reports/:id/shares`, `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId`, `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /schedules`. Verify that `revokeShare` mock is called with the `shareId` value as the `userId` argument.

**`messaging.test.ts`**: Tests for `POST/GET/GET/:id/PATCH /messages/*` compat paths. Verify 201/200 for authenticated users, 401 for unauthenticated.

**`test-center-sites.test.ts`**: Tests for nested `GET/POST /sites/:siteId/rooms`, `PATCH/DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId`, nested `GET/POST /rooms/:roomId/seats`, `PATCH/DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId`, `PATCH /sites/:id`, `PATCH /equipment/:id`, `DELETE /sessions/:id`, `DELETE /seats/:id`, `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId`.

**`notifications.test.ts`**: Tests for snooze with `{ until }` key (200), snooze with neither key (422), `PATCH /templates/:id` (200 admin, 403 non-admin), `DELETE /templates/:id` (204 admin, 403 non-admin, 404 not-found, 401 unauth).

---

## Changed Files Summary

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts` | Add `deleteDefinition` (soft-delete) + `listSchedules` (filtered definitions) |
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts` | Add `deleteDefinition` + `listSchedules` handlers |
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts` | Add PATCH /definitions, POST /reports, shares aliases, schedules CRUD |
| `src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts` | Add 4× `/messages/*` compat aliases |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts` | Add `deleteSeat` + `cancelRegistrationById` |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.controller.ts` | Add `deleteSeat` + `cancelRegistrationById` handlers |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts` | Add PATCH aliases, nested rooms/seats routes, DELETE session/seat/registration |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.schemas.ts` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept `until` or `snoozedUntil` |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts` | Add `deleteTemplate` |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.controller.ts` | Add `deleteTemplate` handler |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.routes.ts` | Add PATCH + DELETE for `/templates/:id` |
| `tests/api/helpers/setup.ts` | Add mock stubs for new service methods |
| `tests/api/analytics.test.ts` | Add compat route test coverage |
| `tests/api/messaging.test.ts` | Add `/messages/*` compat test coverage |
| `tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts` | Add nested route and new endpoint test coverage |
| `tests/api/notifications.test.ts` | Add snooze compat + template PATCH/DELETE test coverage |

---

## Compatibility Mapping Table

| Canonical backend path | Compat alias (frontend-used path) |
|---|---|
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/generate` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports` |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/share` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/shares` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/share/:userId` | `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/shares/:shareId` |
| `GET /api/v1/analytics/schedule-executions` | `GET /api/v1/analytics/schedules` (filtered definitions view) |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/definitions` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/schedules` |
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/analytics/schedules/:id` |
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` (soft-delete) | `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/schedules/:id` |
| `POST /api/v1/messaging/enqueue` | `POST /api/v1/messaging/messages` |
| `GET /api/v1/messaging/` | `GET /api/v1/messaging/messages` |
| `GET /api/v1/messaging/:id` | `GET /api/v1/messaging/messages/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/messaging/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /api/v1/messaging/messages/:id/delivery` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/sites/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sites/:id` |
| `GET /api/v1/test-center/rooms?siteId=` | `GET /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms` |
| `POST /api/v1/test-center/rooms` | `POST /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` |
| `GET /api/v1/test-center/seats?roomId=` | `GET /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats` |
| `POST /api/v1/test-center/seats` | `POST /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/seats/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` |
| _(new)_ `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/seats/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/equipment/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/equipment/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id/cancel` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id` + `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id/register?userId=` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` |
| `PUT /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` |
| _(new)_ `DELETE /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/snooze` body `{ snoozedUntil }` | same path, accepts `{ until }` too |

---

## Verification

```bash
cd backend

# Full test suite with coverage
npx vitest run tests/api --coverage

# Target specific modules for faster iteration during development
npx vitest run tests/api/analytics.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/messaging.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/notifications.test.ts --coverage
```

Confirm all new compat route tests pass AND all existing canonical route tests still pass. Coverage should remain ≥ 90% across all thresholds.

---

## Key Pitfalls

1. **`POST /reports` must come after `POST /reports/generate`** — Express matches exact static paths before dynamic ones within the same verb, but registering order still matters for two static POST routes. `generate` registered first is safe.

2. **Nested room/seat body injection order** — the `req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId` middleware must execute BEFORE `validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema })`, since the schema requires `siteId` as a UUID. The injection middleware must be listed first in the handler chain.

3. **`PATCH /sessions/:id` vs `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`** — these use different HTTP verbs at different specificity levels; Express will route them correctly regardless of registration order. No conflict.

4. **`SnoozeNotificationSchema` transform** — `validate.middleware.ts` reassigns `req.body = result.data` after `safeParse`, so the transform output (`{ snoozedUntil: string }`) correctly replaces whatever the client sent. Controller code unchanged.

5. **`vi.hoisted()` mock additions** — new mock methods (`deleteSeat`, `cancelRegistrationById`, `deleteTemplate`, `deleteDefinition`, `listSchedules`) must be added inside the `vi.hoisted()` call in `setup.ts`, not appended outside it.

6. **`NotificationTemplate` hard-delete is safe** — schema uses `onDelete: SetNull` on both `Notification.templateId` and `OutboundMessage.templateId`, so deleting a template sets those foreign keys to NULL without constraint violations.
"}

{"file_path": "/home/nahom/.claude/plans/bubbly-exploring-beacon.md", "content": "# Plan: Fix API Contract Mismatches

## Context

An audit found blocker-level drift between frontend API endpoint wrappers and backend route definitions across four modules. The frontend is calling paths/verbs that do not exist on the backend. The fix adds backward-compatible alias routes on the backend only — all existing canonical routes are kept intact. No frontend changes required.

---

## Complete Mismatch Inventory

### Analytics (`analytics.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /definitions/:id` | `PUT /definitions/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `POST /reports` | `POST /reports/generate` | Add POST alias (must be after `/reports/generate`) |
| `POST /reports/:id/shares` | `POST /reports/:id/share` | Add POST alias |
| `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` | `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId` | Add DELETE alias; bridge `shareId→userId` param |
| `GET /schedules`, `GET /schedules/:id`, `POST /schedules`, `PATCH /schedules/:id`, `DELETE /schedules/:id` | None (only `GET /schedule-executions` exists) | Add schedules CRUD routes backed by the existing definition controller + new `listSchedules`/`deleteDefinition` service functions |

### Messaging (`messaging.routes.ts`)
Frontend prefixes all message routes with `/messages/`; backend routes are flat:
| Frontend calls | Backend has |
|---|---|
| `POST /messages` | `POST /enqueue` |
| `GET /messages` | `GET /` |
| `GET /messages/:id` | `GET /:id` |
| `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /:id/delivery` |

Fix: add four `/messages/*` aliases pointing to same controllers.

### Test-Center (`test-center.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /sites/:id` | `PUT /sites/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `GET /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `GET /rooms?siteId=` | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.query.siteId` |
| `POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `POST /rooms` (siteId in body) | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.body.siteId` before `validate()` |
| `PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `PUT /rooms/:id` | Add nested PATCH; middleware sets `req.params.id = req.params.roomId` |
| `DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `DELETE /rooms/:id` | Add nested DELETE; bridge roomId→id |
| `GET /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `GET /seats?roomId=` | Add nested route; inject `req.query.roomId` |
| `POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `POST /seats` (roomId in body) | Add nested route; inject `req.body.roomId` |
| `PATCH /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | `PUT /seats/:id` | Add nested PATCH; bridge seatId→id |
| `DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | No delete seat endpoint | Add new `DELETE /seats/:id` route + `deleteSeat` controller/service |
| `PATCH /equipment/:id` | `PUT /equipment/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `PATCH /sessions/:id` | No general update (only cancel) | Add PATCH alias → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:id` | No delete session endpoint | Add DELETE → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` | `DELETE /sessions/:id/register` (reads `?userId=`) | Add nested route + `cancelRegistrationById` service method that looks up registration by ID |

### Notifications
| Issue | Fix |
|---|---|
| Frontend sends `{ until: string }` for snooze; backend schema requires `snoozedUntil` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept both keys, transform to `snoozedUntil` |
| `PATCH /templates/:id` | Backend has `PUT /templates/:id` — add PATCH alias |
| `DELETE /templates/:id` | No delete endpoint — add DELETE route + `deleteTemplate` controller/service |

---

## Implementation Steps (ordered by dependency)

### 1. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts`

Add two standalone functions before the `analyticsService` export object (line 1031):

```typescript
async function deleteDefinition(id: string) {
  const existing = await prisma.reportDefinition.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) throw new NotFoundError('Report definition not found');
  const definition = await prisma.reportDefinition.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { isActive: false },
  });
  logger.info({ definitionId: id }, 'Report definition soft-deleted');
  return definition;
}

async function listSchedules(query: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) {
  const { skip, take, page, pageSize } = parsePagination(query);
  const where = { isActive: true, frequency: { not: 'ON_DEMAND' as ReportFrequency } };
  const [definitions, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.reportDefinition.findMany({
      where, skip, take, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { _count: { select: { reports: true } } },
    }),
    prisma.reportDefinition.count({ where }),
  ]);
  return { data: definitions, meta: buildMeta(total, page, pageSize) };
}
```

Then add `deleteDefinition` and `listSchedules` to the `analyticsService` export object.

### 2. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts`

Append after the existing `updateDefinition` handler:

```typescript
export const deleteDefinition = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await analyticsService.deleteDefinition(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export const listSchedules = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const result = await analyticsService.listSchedules(req.query as any);
  res.status(200).json(paginated(result.data, result.meta));
});
```

### 3. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts`

Add `NextFunction` to the `express` import. Then add the following compat routes (order matters for the POST /reports alias — it must come after `POST /reports/generate`):

- After `PUT /definitions/:id`: add `PATCH /definitions/:id` → same middleware chain + `controller.updateDefinition`
- After `POST /reports/generate`: add `POST /reports` → same middleware chain + `controller.generateReport`
- After `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId`: add:
  - `POST /reports/:id/shares` → same as `POST /reports/:id/share`
  - `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` → inline middleware sets `req.params.userId = req.params.shareId`, then `controller.revokeShare`
- At end of file (before export), add `GET /schedules` (→ `controller.listSchedules`, analyticsRoles), `GET /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.getDefinition`), `POST /schedules` (→ `controller.createDefinition`, analyticsRoles), `PATCH /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.updateDefinition`, managerRoles), `DELETE /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.deleteDefinition`, managerRoles)

Mark all compat blocks with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation.

### 4. `backend/src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts`

Add a clearly labeled section at end of file (before export) with four aliases:
- `POST /messages` → same middleware as `POST /enqueue`
- `GET /messages` → same middleware as `GET /`
- `GET /messages/:id` → `controller.getMessageStatus`
- `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` → same middleware as `PATCH /:id/delivery`

No new imports needed.

### 5. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts`

Add to the `TestCenterService` class after `updateSeat`:

```typescript
async deleteSeat(id: string) {
  const seat = await prisma.testSeat.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!seat) throw new NotFoundError('Test seat not found');
  await prisma.testSeat.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ seatId: id }, 'Test seat deleted');
}

async cancelRegistrationById(registrationId: string, actorId: string) {
  const registration = await prisma.testRegistration.findUnique({
    where: { id: registrationId },
  });
  if (!registration) throw new NotFoundError('Registration not found');
  return this.cancelRegistration(registration.sessionId, registration.userId, actorId);
}
```

### 6. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.controller.ts`

Append after `updateSeat`:
```typescript
export const deleteSeat = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.deleteSeat(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

Append after `cancelRegistration`:
```typescript
export const cancelRegistrationById = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.cancelRegistrationById(req.params.registrationId, req.userId);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 7. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts`

Add `Request, Response, NextFunction` to the `express` import.

Add compat routes in labeled sections:

**PATCH aliases for flat resources** (after respective PUT blocks):
- `PATCH /sites/:id` → same chain as `PUT /sites/:id` (`updateSite`)
- `PATCH /seats/:id` → same chain as `PUT /seats/:id` (`updateSeat`)
- `PATCH /equipment/:id` → same chain as `PUT /equipment/:id` (`updateEquipment`)

**New flat routes for missing CRUD** (after existing seat routes):
- `DELETE /seats/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN only) → `controller.deleteSeat`

**Session compat routes** (after `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`):
- `PATCH /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`
- `DELETE /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`

**Nested rooms** (new labeled section):
```typescript
// GET /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into query
router.get('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  controller.listRooms);

// POST /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into body BEFORE validate()
router.post('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema }),
  controller.createRoom);

// PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.patch('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateRoomSchema }),
  controller.updateRoom);

// DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.delete('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.deleteRoom);
```

**Nested seats** (new labeled section):
```typescript
router.get('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.listSeats);

router.post('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateSeatSchema }),
  controller.createSeat);

router.patch('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateSeatSchema }),
  controller.updateSeat);

router.delete('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  controller.deleteSeat);
```

**Registration by ID** (after existing `DELETE /sessions/:id/register`):
```typescript
router.delete('/sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId', requireAuth,
  controller.cancelRegistrationById);
```

### 8. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.schemas.ts`

Replace the current `SnoozeNotificationSchema`:

```typescript
export const SnoozeNotificationSchema = z
  .object({
    snoozedUntil: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    until: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  })
  .refine((val) => val.snoozedUntil !== undefined || val.until !== undefined, {
    message: 'Either snoozedUntil or until is required',
  })
  .transform((val) => ({ snoozedUntil: (val.snoozedUntil ?? val.until)! }));
```

The `validate` middleware does `req.body = result.data` after `.safeParse()`, so the controller will always receive `{ snoozedUntil: string }` after the transform. `SnoozeNotificationBody` type inferred from the schema remains `{ snoozedUntil: string }` — controller code unchanged.

### 9. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts`

Add `deleteTemplate` to the `NotificationsService` class (`NotificationTemplate.onDelete: SetNull` on its relations, so hard-delete is safe):

```typescript
async deleteTemplate(id: string) {
  await this.getTemplate(id); // throws NotFoundError if not found
  await prisma.notificationTemplate.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ templateId: id }, 'Notification template deleted');
}
```

### 10. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.controller.ts`

Append after `updateTemplate`:

```typescript
export const deleteTemplate = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await notificationsService.deleteTemplate(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 11. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.routes.ts`

Add after the existing `PUT /templates/:id` block (before `POST /templates/preview`):

```typescript
// COMPAT: frontend calls PATCH /templates/:id
router.patch('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  validate({ body: UpdateTemplateSchema }), controller.updateTemplate);

router.delete('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  controller.deleteTemplate);
```

### 12. `backend/tests/api/helpers/setup.ts`

Add missing mock methods inside the `vi.hoisted()` block:

- `mockAnalyticsServiceObj`: add `deleteDefinition: vi.fn()`, `listSchedules: vi.fn()`
- `mockTestCenterServiceObj`: add `deleteSeat: vi.fn()`, `cancelRegistrationById: vi.fn()`
- `mockNotificationsServiceObj`: add `deleteTemplate: vi.fn()`

### 13–16. Test files

Add `describe` blocks to existing test files (append, do not replace):

**`analytics.test.ts`**: Tests for `PATCH /definitions/:id`, `POST /reports` (compat), `POST /reports/:id/shares`, `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId`, `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /schedules`. Verify that `revokeShare` mock is called with the `shareId` value as the `userId` argument.

**`messaging.test.ts`**: Tests for `POST/GET/GET/:id/PATCH /messages/*` compat paths. Verify 201/200 for authenticated users, 401 for unauthenticated.

**`test-center-sites.test.ts`**: Tests for nested `GET/POST /sites/:siteId/rooms`, `PATCH/DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId`, nested `GET/POST /rooms/:roomId/seats`, `PATCH/DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId`, `PATCH /sites/:id`, `PATCH /equipment/:id`, `DELETE /sessions/:id`, `DELETE /seats/:id`, `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId`.

**`notifications.test.ts`**: Tests for snooze with `{ until }` key (200), snooze with neither key (422), `PATCH /templates/:id` (200 admin, 403 non-admin), `DELETE /templates/:id` (204 admin, 403 non-admin, 404 not-found, 401 unauth).

---

## Changed Files Summary

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts` | Add `deleteDefinition` (soft-delete) + `listSchedules` (filtered definitions) |
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts` | Add `deleteDefinition` + `listSchedules` handlers |
| `src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts` | Add PATCH /definitions, POST /reports, shares aliases, schedules CRUD |
| `src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts` | Add 4× `/messages/*` compat aliases |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts` | Add `deleteSeat` + `cancelRegistrationById` |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.controller.ts` | Add `deleteSeat` + `cancelRegistrationById` handlers |
| `src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts` | Add PATCH aliases, nested rooms/seats routes, DELETE session/seat/registration |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.schemas.ts` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept `until` or `snoozedUntil` |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts` | Add `deleteTemplate` |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.controller.ts` | Add `deleteTemplate` handler |
| `src/modules/notifications/notifications.routes.ts` | Add PATCH + DELETE for `/templates/:id` |
| `tests/api/helpers/setup.ts` | Add mock stubs for new service methods |
| `tests/api/analytics.test.ts` | Add compat route test coverage |
| `tests/api/messaging.test.ts` | Add `/messages/*` compat test coverage |
| `tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts` | Add nested route and new endpoint test coverage |
| `tests/api/notifications.test.ts` | Add snooze compat + template PATCH/DELETE test coverage |

---

## Compatibility Mapping Table

| Canonical backend path | Compat alias (frontend-used path) |
|---|---|
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/generate` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports` |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/share` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/shares` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/share/:userId` | `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/reports/:id/shares/:shareId` |
| `GET /api/v1/analytics/schedule-executions` | `GET /api/v1/analytics/schedules` (filtered definitions view) |
| `POST /api/v1/analytics/definitions` | `POST /api/v1/analytics/schedules` |
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/analytics/schedules/:id` |
| `PUT /api/v1/analytics/definitions/:id` (soft-delete) | `DELETE /api/v1/analytics/schedules/:id` |
| `POST /api/v1/messaging/enqueue` | `POST /api/v1/messaging/messages` |
| `GET /api/v1/messaging/` | `GET /api/v1/messaging/messages` |
| `GET /api/v1/messaging/:id` | `GET /api/v1/messaging/messages/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/messaging/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /api/v1/messaging/messages/:id/delivery` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/sites/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sites/:id` |
| `GET /api/v1/test-center/rooms?siteId=` | `GET /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms` |
| `POST /api/v1/test-center/rooms` | `POST /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` |
| `GET /api/v1/test-center/seats?roomId=` | `GET /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats` |
| `POST /api/v1/test-center/seats` | `POST /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/seats/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` |
| _(new)_ `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/seats/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` |
| `PUT /api/v1/test-center/equipment/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/equipment/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id/cancel` | `PATCH /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id` + `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id` |
| `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:id/register?userId=` | `DELETE /api/v1/test-center/sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` |
| `PUT /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` | `PATCH /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` |
| _(new)_ `DELETE /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` | `DELETE /api/v1/notifications/templates/:id` |
| `PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/snooze` body `{ snoozedUntil }` | same path, accepts `{ until }` too |

---

## Verification

```bash
cd backend

# Full test suite with coverage
npx vitest run tests/api --coverage

# Target specific modules for faster iteration during development
npx vitest run tests/api/analytics.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/messaging.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/notifications.test.ts --coverage
```

Confirm all new compat route tests pass AND all existing canonical route tests still pass. Coverage should remain ≥ 90% across all thresholds.

---

## Key Pitfalls

1. **`POST /reports` must come after `POST /reports/generate`** — Express matches exact static paths before dynamic ones within the same verb, but registering order still matters for two static POST routes. `generate` registered first is safe.

2. **Nested room/seat body injection order** — the `req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId` middleware must execute BEFORE `validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema })`, since the schema requires `siteId` as a UUID. The injection middleware must be listed first in the handler chain.

3. **`PATCH /sessions/:id` vs `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`** — these use different HTTP verbs at different specificity levels; Express will route them correctly regardless of registration order. No conflict.

4. **`SnoozeNotificationSchema` transform** — `validate.middleware.ts` reassigns `req.body = result.data` after `safeParse`, so the transform output (`{ snoozedUntil: string }`) correctly replaces whatever the client sent. Controller code unchanged.

5. **`vi.hoisted()` mock additions** — new mock methods (`deleteSeat`, `cancelRegistrationById`, `deleteTemplate`, `deleteDefinition`, `listSchedules`) must be added inside the `vi.hoisted()` call in `setup.ts`, not appended outside it.

6. **`NotificationTemplate` hard-delete is safe** — schema uses `onDelete: SetNull` on both `Notification.templateId` and `OutboundMessage.templateId`, so deleting a template sets those foreign keys to NULL without constraint violations.
"}

content.arguments:
{"summary": "The plan adds backward-compatible backend alias routes for all four modules. Here's the overview:

**16 files changed** (11 source + 1 test helper + 4 test files)

**Analytics** — PATCH alias for `PUT /definitions/:id`; POST alias for `POST /reports/generate`; POST+DELETE aliases for `/reports/:id/shares`; full `/schedules` CRUD backed by existing definition service + new `deleteDefinition`/`listSchedules` functions.

**Messaging** — 4 aliases under `/messages/*` prefix mapping to the existing flat routes.

**Test-Center** — PATCH aliases for sites/seats/equipment; nested `GET/POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` and `GET/POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` routes (using inline middleware to inject path params into body/query); PATCH+DELETE aliases for nested rooms and seats; new `DELETE /seats/:id` endpoint; `DELETE /sessions/:id` and `PATCH /sessions/:id` both map to cancelSession; new `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` backed by `cancelRegistrationById` service method.

**Notifications** — `SnoozeNotificationSchema` updated to accept either `{ until }` or `{ snoozedUntil }` via a `.refine().transform()` chain (validated middleware writes transform output back to `req.body`); PATCH alias for `PUT /templates/:id`; new `DELETE /templates/:id` endpoint (hard-delete is safe since the FK uses `onDelete: SetNull`).

All existing routes remain untouched. Compat routes are marked with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation tracking.", "plan": "# Plan: Fix API Contract Mismatches

## Context

An audit found blocker-level drift between frontend API endpoint wrappers and backend route definitions across four modules. The frontend is calling paths/verbs that do not exist on the backend. The fix adds backward-compatible alias routes on the backend only — all existing canonical routes are kept intact. No frontend changes required.

---

## Complete Mismatch Inventory

### Analytics (`analytics.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /definitions/:id` | `PUT /definitions/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `POST /reports` | `POST /reports/generate` | Add POST alias (must be after `/reports/generate`) |
| `POST /reports/:id/shares` | `POST /reports/:id/share` | Add POST alias |
| `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` | `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId` | Add DELETE alias; bridge `shareId→userId` param |
| `GET /schedules`, `GET /schedules/:id`, `POST /schedules`, `PATCH /schedules/:id`, `DELETE /schedules/:id` | None (only `GET /schedule-executions` exists) | Add schedules CRUD routes backed by the existing definition controller + new `listSchedules`/`deleteDefinition` service functions |

### Messaging (`messaging.routes.ts`)
Frontend prefixes all message routes with `/messages/`; backend routes are flat:
| Frontend calls | Backend has |
|---|---|
| `POST /messages` | `POST /enqueue` |
| `GET /messages` | `GET /` |
| `GET /messages/:id` | `GET /:id` |
| `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /:id/delivery` |

Fix: add four `/messages/*` aliases pointing to same controllers.

### Test-Center (`test-center.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /sites/:id` | `PUT /sites/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `GET /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `GET /rooms?siteId=` | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.query.siteId` |
| `POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `POST /rooms` (siteId in body) | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.body.siteId` before `validate()` |
| `PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `PUT /rooms/:id` | Add nested PATCH; middleware sets `req.params.id = req.params.roomId` |
| `DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `DELETE /rooms/:id` | Add nested DELETE; bridge roomId→id |
| `GET /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `GET /seats?roomId=` | Add nested route; inject `req.query.roomId` |
| `POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `POST /seats` (roomId in body) | Add nested route; inject `req.body.roomId` |
| `PATCH /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | `PUT /seats/:id` | Add nested PATCH; bridge seatId→id |
| `DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | No delete seat endpoint | Add new `DELETE /seats/:id` route + `deleteSeat` controller/service |
| `PATCH /equipment/:id` | `PUT /equipment/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `PATCH /sessions/:id` | No general update (only cancel) | Add PATCH alias → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:id` | No delete session endpoint | Add DELETE → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` | `DELETE /sessions/:id/register` (reads `?userId=`) | Add nested route + `cancelRegistrationById` service method that looks up registration by ID |

### Notifications
| Issue | Fix |
|---|---|
| Frontend sends `{ until: string }` for snooze; backend schema requires `snoozedUntil` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept both keys, transform to `snoozedUntil` |
| `PATCH /templates/:id` | Backend has `PUT /templates/:id` — add PATCH alias |
| `DELETE /templates/:id` | No delete endpoint — add DELETE route + `deleteTemplate` controller/service |

---

## Implementation Steps (ordered by dependency)

### 1. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts`

Add two standalone functions before the `analyticsService` export object (line 1031):

```typescript
async function deleteDefinition(id: string) {
  const existing = await prisma.reportDefinition.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) throw new NotFoundError('Report definition not found');
  const definition = await prisma.reportDefinition.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { isActive: false },
  });
  logger.info({ definitionId: id }, 'Report definition soft-deleted');
  return definition;
}

async function listSchedules(query: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) {
  const { skip, take, page, pageSize } = parsePagination(query);
  const where = { isActive: true, frequency: { not: 'ON_DEMAND' as ReportFrequency } };
  const [definitions, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.reportDefinition.findMany({
      where, skip, take, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { _count: { select: { reports: true } } },
    }),
    prisma.reportDefinition.count({ where }),
  ]);
  return { data: definitions, meta: buildMeta(total, page, pageSize) };
}
```

Then add `deleteDefinition` and `listSchedules` to the `analyticsService` export object.

### 2. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts`

Append after the existing `updateDefinition` handler:

```typescript
export const deleteDefinition = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await analyticsService.deleteDefinition(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export const listSchedules = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const result = await analyticsService.listSchedules(req.query as any);
  res.status(200).json(paginated(result.data, result.meta));
});
```

### 3. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts`

Add `NextFunction` to the `express` import. Then add the following compat routes (order matters for the POST /reports alias — it must come after `POST /reports/generate`):

- After `PUT /definitions/:id`: add `PATCH /definitions/:id` → same middleware chain + `controller.updateDefinition`
- After `POST /reports/generate`: add `POST /reports` → same middleware chain + `controller.generateReport`
- After `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId`: add:
  - `POST /reports/:id/shares` → same as `POST /reports/:id/share`
  - `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` → inline middleware sets `req.params.userId = req.params.shareId`, then `controller.revokeShare`
- At end of file (before export), add `GET /schedules` (→ `controller.listSchedules`, analyticsRoles), `GET /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.getDefinition`), `POST /schedules` (→ `controller.createDefinition`, analyticsRoles), `PATCH /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.updateDefinition`, managerRoles), `DELETE /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.deleteDefinition`, managerRoles)

Mark all compat blocks with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation.

### 4. `backend/src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts`

Add a clearly labeled section at end of file (before export) with four aliases:
- `POST /messages` → same middleware as `POST /enqueue`
- `GET /messages` → same middleware as `GET /`
- `GET /messages/:id` → `controller.getMessageStatus`
- `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` → same middleware as `PATCH /:id/delivery`

No new imports needed.

### 5. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts`

Add to the `TestCenterService` class after `updateSeat`:

```typescript
async deleteSeat(id: string) {
  const seat = await prisma.testSeat.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!seat) throw new NotFoundError('Test seat not found');
  await prisma.testSeat.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ seatId: id }, 'Test seat deleted');
}

async cancelRegistrationById(registrationId: string, actorId: string) {
  const registration = await prisma.testRegistration.findUnique({
    where: { id: registrationId },
  });
  if (!registration) throw new NotFoundError('Registration not found');
  return this.cancelRegistration(registration.sessionId, registration.userId, actorId);
}
```

### 6. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.controller.ts`

Append after `updateSeat`:
```typescript
export const deleteSeat = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.deleteSeat(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

Append after `cancelRegistration`:
```typescript
export const cancelRegistrationById = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await testCenterService.cancelRegistrationById(req.params.registrationId, req.userId);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 7. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts`

Add `Request, Response, NextFunction` to the `express` import.

Add compat routes in labeled sections:

**PATCH aliases for flat resources** (after respective PUT blocks):
- `PATCH /sites/:id` → same chain as `PUT /sites/:id` (`updateSite`)
- `PATCH /seats/:id` → same chain as `PUT /seats/:id` (`updateSeat`)
- `PATCH /equipment/:id` → same chain as `PUT /equipment/:id` (`updateEquipment`)

**New flat routes for missing CRUD** (after existing seat routes):
- `DELETE /seats/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN only) → `controller.deleteSeat`

**Session compat routes** (after `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`):
- `PATCH /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`
- `DELETE /sessions/:id` (SYSTEM_ADMIN, TEST_PROCTOR) → `controller.cancelSession`

**Nested rooms** (new labeled section):
```typescript
// GET /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into query
router.get('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  controller.listRooms);

// POST /sites/:siteId/rooms — inject siteId into body BEFORE validate()
router.post('/sites/:siteId/rooms', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema }),
  controller.createRoom);

// PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.patch('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateRoomSchema }),
  controller.updateRoom);

// DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId — bridge roomId→id
router.delete('/sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.deleteRoom);
```

**Nested seats** (new labeled section):
```typescript
router.get('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  (req, _res, next) => { req.query.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  controller.listSeats);

router.post('/rooms/:roomId/seats', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.body.roomId = req.params.roomId; next(); },
  validate({ body: CreateSeatSchema }),
  controller.createSeat);

router.patch('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN, ROLES.TEST_PROCTOR),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  validate({ body: UpdateSeatSchema }),
  controller.updateSeat);

router.delete('/rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId', requireAuth,
  requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  (req, _res, next) => { req.params.id = req.params.seatId; next(); },
  controller.deleteSeat);
```

**Registration by ID** (after existing `DELETE /sessions/:id/register`):
```typescript
router.delete('/sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId', requireAuth,
  controller.cancelRegistrationById);
```

### 8. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.schemas.ts`

Replace the current `SnoozeNotificationSchema`:

```typescript
export const SnoozeNotificationSchema = z
  .object({
    snoozedUntil: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    until: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  })
  .refine((val) => val.snoozedUntil !== undefined || val.until !== undefined, {
    message: 'Either snoozedUntil or until is required',
  })
  .transform((val) => ({ snoozedUntil: (val.snoozedUntil ?? val.until)! }));
```

The `validate` middleware does `req.body = result.data` after `.safeParse()`, so the controller will always receive `{ snoozedUntil: string }` after the transform. `SnoozeNotificationBody` type inferred from the schema remains `{ snoozedUntil: string }` — controller code unchanged.

### 9. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts`

Add `deleteTemplate` to the `NotificationsService` class (`NotificationTemplate.onDelete: SetNull` on its relations, so hard-delete is safe):

```typescript
async deleteTemplate(id: string) {
  await this.getTemplate(id); // throws NotFoundError if not found
  await prisma.notificationTemplate.delete({ where: { id } });
  logger.info({ templateId: id }, 'Notification template deleted');
}
```

### 10. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.controller.ts`

Append after `updateTemplate`:

```typescript
export const deleteTemplate = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await notificationsService.deleteTemplate(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});
```

### 11. `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.routes.ts`

Add after the existing `PUT /templates/:id` block (before `POST /templates/preview`):

```typescript
// COMPAT: frontend calls PATCH /templates/:id
router.patch('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  validate({ body: UpdateTemplateSchema }), controller.updateTemplate);

router.delete('/templates/:id', requireAuth, requireRole(ROLES.SYSTEM_ADMIN),
  controller.deleteTemplate);
```

### 12. `backend/tests/api/helpers/setup.ts`

Add missing mock methods inside the `vi.hoisted()` block:

## Verification

```bash
# Full test suite with coverage
npx vitest run tests/api --coverage

# Target specific modules for faster iteration during development
npx vitest run tests/api/analytics.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/messaging.test.ts --coverage

```

Confirm all new compat route tests pass AND all existing canonical route tests still pass. Coverage should remain ≥ 90% across all thresholds.

---

## Key Pitfalls

1. **`POST /reports` must come after `POST /reports/generate`** — Express matches exact static paths before dynamic ones within the same verb, but registering order still matters for two static POST routes. `generate` registered first is safe.

2. **Nested room/seat body injection order** — the `req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId` middleware must execute BEFORE `validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema })`, since the schema requires `siteId` as a UUID. The injection middleware must be listed first in the handler chain.

3. **`PATCH /sessions/:id` vs `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`** — these use different HTTP verbs at different specificity levels; Express will route them correctly regardless of registration order. No conflict.

4. **`SnoozeNotificationSchema` transform** — `validate.middleware.ts` reassigns `req.body = result.data` after `safeParse`, so the transform output (`{ snoozedUntil: string }`) correctly replaces whatever the client sent. Controller code unchanged.

5. **`vi.hoisted()` mock additions** — new mock methods (`deleteSeat`, `cancelRegistrationById`, `deleteTemplate`, `deleteDefinition`, `listSchedules`) must be added inside the `vi.hoisted()` call in `setup.ts`, not appended outside it.

6. **`NotificationTemplate` hard-delete is safe** — schema uses `onDelete: SetNull` on both `Notification.templateId` and `OutboundMessage.templateId`, so deleting a template sets those foreign keys to NULL without constraint violations.

{"summary": "The plan adds backward-compatible backend alias routes for all four modules. Here's the overview:

**16 files changed** (11 source + 1 test helper + 4 test files)

**Analytics** — PATCH alias for `PUT /definitions/:id`; POST alias for `POST /reports/generate`; POST+DELETE aliases for `/reports/:id/shares`; full `/schedules` CRUD backed by existing definition service + new `deleteDefinition`/`listSchedules` functions.

**Messaging** — 4 aliases under `/messages/*` prefix mapping to the existing flat routes.

**Test-Center** — PATCH aliases for sites/seats/equipment; nested `GET/POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` and `GET/POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` routes (using inline middleware to inject path params into body/query); PATCH+DELETE aliases for nested rooms and seats; new `DELETE /seats/:id` endpoint; `DELETE /sessions/:id` and `PATCH /sessions/:id` both map to cancelSession; new `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` backed by `cancelRegistrationById` service method.

**Notifications** — `SnoozeNotificationSchema` updated to accept either `{ until }` or `{ snoozedUntil }` via a `.refine().transform()` chain (validated middleware writes transform output back to `req.body`); PATCH alias for `PUT /templates/:id`; new `DELETE /templates/:id` endpoint (hard-delete is safe since the FK uses `onDelete: SetNull`).

All existing routes remain untouched. Compat routes are marked with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation tracking.", "plan": "# Plan: Fix API Contract Mismatches

## Context

An audit found blocker-level drift between frontend API endpoint wrappers and backend route definitions across four modules. The frontend is calling paths/verbs that do not exist on the backend. The fix adds backward-compatible alias routes on the backend only — all existing canonical routes are kept intact. No frontend changes required.

---

## Complete Mismatch Inventory

### Analytics (`analytics.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /definitions/:id` | `PUT /definitions/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `POST /reports` | `POST /reports/generate` | Add POST alias (must be after `/reports/generate`) |
| `POST /reports/:id/shares` | `POST /reports/:id/share` | Add POST alias |
| `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` | `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId` | Add DELETE alias; bridge `shareId→userId` param |
| `GET /schedules`, `GET /schedules/:id`, `POST /schedules`, `PATCH /schedules/:id`, `DELETE /schedules/:id` | None (only `GET /schedule-executions` exists) | Add schedules CRUD routes backed by the existing definition controller + new `listSchedules`/`deleteDefinition` service functions |

### Messaging (`messaging.routes.ts`)
Frontend prefixes all message routes with `/messages/`; backend routes are flat:
| Frontend calls | Backend has |
|---|---|
| `POST /messages` | `POST /enqueue` |
| `GET /messages` | `GET /` |
| `GET /messages/:id` | `GET /:id` |
| `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /:id/delivery` |

Fix: add four `/messages/*` aliases pointing to same controllers.

### Test-Center (`test-center.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /sites/:id` | `PUT /sites/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `GET /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `GET /rooms?siteId=` | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.query.siteId` |
| `POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `POST /rooms` (siteId in body) | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.body.siteId` before `validate()` |
| `PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `PUT /rooms/:id` | Add nested PATCH; middleware sets `req.params.id = req.params.roomId` |
| `DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `DELETE /rooms/:id` | Add nested DELETE; bridge roomId→id |
| `GET /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `GET /seats?roomId=` | Add nested route; inject `req.query.roomId` |
| `POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `POST /seats` (roomId in body) | Add nested route; inject `req.body.roomId` |
| `PATCH /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | `PUT /seats/:id` | Add nested PATCH; bridge seatId→id |
| `DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | No delete seat endpoint | Add new `DELETE /seats/:id` route + `deleteSeat` controller/service |
| `PATCH /equipment/:id` | `PUT /equipment/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `PATCH /sessions/:id` | No general update (only cancel) | Add PATCH alias → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:id` | No delete session endpoint | Add DELETE → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` | `DELETE /sessions/:id/register` (reads `?userId=`) | Add nested route + `cancelRegistrationById` service method that looks up registration by ID |

### Notifications
| Issue | Fix |
|---|---|
| Frontend sends `{ until: string }` for snooze; backend schema requires `snoozedUntil` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept both keys, transform to `snoozedUntil` |
| `PATCH /templates/:id` | Backend has `PUT /templates/:id` — add PATCH alias |
| `DELETE /templates/:id` | No delete endpoint — add DELETE route + `deleteTemplate` controller/service |

## Implementation Steps (ordered by dependency)

### 1. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts`

Add two standalone functions before the `analyticsService` export object (line 1031):

```typescript
async function deleteDefinition(id: string) {
  const existing = await prisma.reportDefinition.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) throw new NotFoundError('Report definition not found');
  const definition = await prisma.reportDefinition.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { isActive: false },
  });
  logger.info({ definitionId: id }, 'Report definition soft-deleted');
  return definition;
}

async function listSchedules(query: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) {
  const { skip, take, page, pageSize } = parsePagination(query);
  const where = { isActive: true, frequency: { not: 'ON_DEMAND' as ReportFrequency } };
  const [definitions, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.reportDefinition.findMany({
      where, skip, take, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { _count: { select: { reports: true } } },
    }),
    prisma.reportDefinition.count({ where }),
  ]);
  return { data: definitions, meta: buildMeta(total, page, pageSize) };
}
```

Then add `deleteDefinition` and `listSchedules` to the `analyticsService` export object.

### 2. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts`

```typescript
  res.status(204).send();

export const listSchedules = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const result = await analyticsService.listSchedules(req.query as any);
  res.status(200).json(paginated(result.data, result.meta));
});
```

```typescript
async deleteSeat(id: string) {
  const seat = await prisma.testSeat.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!seat) throw new NotFoundError('Test seat not found');
  await prisma.testSeat.delete({ where: { id } });

async cancelRegistrationById(registrationId: string, actorId: string) {
  const registration = await prisma.testRegistration.findUnique({
    where: { id: registrationId },

  return this.cancelRegistration(registration.sessionId, registration.userId, actorId);
}
```

Replace the current `SnoozeNotificationSchema`:

```typescript
export const SnoozeNotificationSchema = z
  .object({
    snoozedUntil: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    until: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  })
  .refine((val) => val.snoozedUntil !== undefined || val.until !== undefined, {
    message: 'Either snoozedUntil or until is required',
  })
  .transform((val) => ({ snoozedUntil: (val.snoozedUntil ?? val.until)! }));
```

The `validate` middleware does `req.body = result.data` after `.safeParse()`, so the controller will always receive `{ snoozedUntil: string }` after the transform. `SnoozeNotificationBody` type inferred from the schema remains `{ snoozedUntil: string }` — controller code unchanged.

## Verification

```bash
cd backend

# Full test suite with coverage
npx vitest run tests/api --coverage

# Target specific modules for faster iteration during development
npx vitest run tests/api/analytics.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/messaging.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/notifications.test.ts --coverage
```

Confirm all new compat route tests pass AND all existing canonical route tests still pass. Coverage should remain ≥ 90% across all thresholds.

---

## Key Pitfalls

1. **`POST /reports` must come after `POST /reports/generate`** — Express matches exact static paths before dynamic ones within the same verb, but registering order still matters for two static POST routes. `generate` registered first is safe.

2. **Nested room/seat body injection order** — the `req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId` middleware must execute BEFORE `validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema })`, since the schema requires `siteId` as a UUID. The injection middleware must be listed first in the handler chain.

3. **`PATCH /sessions/:id` vs `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`** — these use different HTTP verbs at different specificity levels; Express will route them correctly regardless of registration order. No conflict.

4. **`SnoozeNotificationSchema` transform** — `validate.middleware.ts` reassigns `req.body = result.data` after `safeParse`, so the transform output (`{ snoozedUntil: string }`) correctly replaces whatever the client sent. Controller code unchanged.

5. **`vi.hoisted()` mock additions** — new mock methods (`deleteSeat`, `cancelRegistrationById`, `deleteTemplate`, `deleteDefinition`, `listSchedules`) must be added inside the `vi.hoisted()` call in `setup.ts`, not appended outside it.

6. **`NotificationTemplate` hard-delete is safe** — schema uses `onDelete: SetNull` on both `Notification.templateId` and `OutboundMessage.templateId`, so deleting a template sets those foreign keys to NULL without constraint violations.

## Approved Plan:
# Plan: Fix API Contract Mismatches

## Context

An audit found blocker-level drift between frontend API endpoint wrappers and backend route definitions across four modules. The frontend is calling paths/verbs that do not exist on the backend. The fix adds backward-compatible alias routes on the backend only — all existing canonical routes are kept intact. No frontend changes required.

---

## Complete Mismatch Inventory

### Analytics (`analytics.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /definitions/:id` | `PUT /definitions/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `POST /reports` | `POST /reports/generate` | Add POST alias (must be after `/reports/generate`) |
| `POST /reports/:id/shares` | `POST /reports/:id/share` | Add POST alias |
| `DELETE /reports/:id/shares/:shareId` | `DELETE /reports/:id/share/:userId` | Add DELETE alias; bridge `shareId→userId` param |
| `GET /schedules`, `GET /schedules/:id`, `POST /schedules`, `PATCH /schedules/:id`, `DELETE /schedules/:id` | None (only `GET /schedule-executions` exists) | Add schedules CRUD routes backed by the existing definition controller + new `listSchedules`/`deleteDefinition` service functions |

### Messaging (`messaging.routes.ts`)
Frontend prefixes all message routes with `/messages/`; backend routes are flat:
| Frontend calls | Backend has |
|---|---|
| `POST /messages` | `POST /enqueue` |
| `GET /messages` | `GET /` |
| `GET /messages/:id` | `GET /:id` |
| `PATCH /messages/:id/delivery` | `PATCH /:id/delivery` |

Fix: add four `/messages/*` aliases pointing to same controllers.

### Test-Center (`test-center.routes.ts`)
| Frontend calls | Backend has | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `PATCH /sites/:id` | `PUT /sites/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `GET /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `GET /rooms?siteId=` | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.query.siteId` |
| `POST /sites/:siteId/rooms` | `POST /rooms` (siteId in body) | Add nested route; middleware injects `req.body.siteId` before `validate()` |
| `PATCH /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `PUT /rooms/:id` | Add nested PATCH; middleware sets `req.params.id = req.params.roomId` |
| `DELETE /sites/:siteId/rooms/:roomId` | `DELETE /rooms/:id` | Add nested DELETE; bridge roomId→id |
| `GET /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `GET /seats?roomId=` | Add nested route; inject `req.query.roomId` |
| `POST /rooms/:roomId/seats` | `POST /seats` (roomId in body) | Add nested route; inject `req.body.roomId` |
| `PATCH /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | `PUT /seats/:id` | Add nested PATCH; bridge seatId→id |
| `DELETE /rooms/:roomId/seats/:seatId` | No delete seat endpoint | Add new `DELETE /seats/:id` route + `deleteSeat` controller/service |
| `PATCH /equipment/:id` | `PUT /equipment/:id` | Add PATCH alias |
| `PATCH /sessions/:id` | No general update (only cancel) | Add PATCH alias → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:id` | No delete session endpoint | Add DELETE → maps to `cancelSession` |
| `DELETE /sessions/:sessionId/registrations/:registrationId` | `DELETE /sessions/:id/register` (reads `?userId=`) | Add nested route + `cancelRegistrationById` service method that looks up registration by ID |

### Notifications
| Issue | Fix |
|---|---|
| Frontend sends `{ until: string }` for snooze; backend schema requires `snoozedUntil` | Update `SnoozeNotificationSchema` to accept both keys, transform to `snoozedUntil` |
| `PATCH /templates/:id` | Backend has `PUT /templates/:id` — add PATCH alias |
| `DELETE /templates/:id` | No delete endpoint — add DELETE route + `deleteTemplate` controller/service |

---

## Implementation Steps (ordered by dependency)

### 1. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.service.ts`

Add two standalone functions before the `analyticsService` export object (line 1031):

```typescript
async function deleteDefinition(id: string) {
  const existing = await prisma.reportDefinition.findUnique({ where: { id } });
  if (!existing) throw new NotFoundError('Report definition not found');
  const definition = await prisma.reportDefinition.update({
    where: { id },
    data: { isActive: false },
  });
  logger.info({ definitionId: id }, 'Report definition soft-deleted');
  return definition;
}

async function listSchedules(query: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) {
  const { skip, take, page, pageSize } = parsePagination(query);
  const where = { isActive: true, frequency: { not: 'ON_DEMAND' as ReportFrequency } };
  const [definitions, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.reportDefinition.findMany({
      where, skip, take, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { _count: { select: { reports: true } } },
    }),
    prisma.reportDefinition.count({ where }),
  ]);
  return { data: definitions, meta: buildMeta(total, page, pageSize) };
}
```

Then add `deleteDefinition` and `listSchedules` to the `analyticsService` export object.

### 2. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.controller.ts`

Append after the existing `updateDefinition` handler:

```typescript
export const deleteDefinition = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  await analyticsService.deleteDefinition(req.params.id);
  res.status(204).send();
});

export const listSchedules = asyncHandler(async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const result = await analyticsService.listSchedules(req.query as any);
  res.status(200).json(paginated(result.data, result.meta));
});
```

### 3. `backend/src/modules/analytics/analytics.routes.ts`

Add `NextFunction` to the `express` import. Then add the following compat routes (order matters for the POST /reports alias — it must come after `POST /reports/generate`):

- At end of file (before export), add `GET /schedules` (→ `controller.listSchedules`, analyticsRoles), `GET /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.getDefinition`), `POST /schedules` (→ `controller.createDefinition`, analyticsRoles), `PATCH /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.updateDefinition`, managerRoles), `DELETE /schedules/:id` (→ `controller.deleteDefinition`, managerRoles)

Mark all compat blocks with `// COMPAT:` comments for future deprecation.

### 4. `backend/src/modules/messaging/messaging.routes.ts`

Add a clearly labeled section at end of file (before export) with four aliases:

### 5. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.service.ts`

```typescript
async deleteSeat(id: string) {

async cancelRegistrationById(registrationId: string, actorId: string) {
```

### 7. `backend/src/modules/test-center/test-center.routes.ts`

```typescript
export const SnoozeNotificationSchema = z
  .object({
    snoozedUntil: z.string().datetime().optional(),
    until: z.string().datetime().optional(),
  })
  .refine((val) => val.snoozedUntil !== undefined || val.until !== undefined, {

  .transform((val) => ({ snoozedUntil: (val.snoozedUntil ?? val.until)! }));
```

| `GET /api/v1/test-center/rooms?siteId=` | `GET /api/v1/test-center/sites/:siteId/rooms` |

---

## Verification

```bash
cd backend

# Full test suite with coverage
npx vitest run tests/api --coverage

# Target specific modules for faster iteration during development
npx vitest run tests/api/analytics.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/messaging.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/test-center-sites.test.ts --coverage
npx vitest run tests/api/notifications.test.ts --coverage
```

Confirm all new compat route tests pass AND all existing canonical route tests still pass. Coverage should remain ≥ 90% across all thresholds.

---

## Key Pitfalls

1. **`POST /reports` must come after `POST /reports/generate`** — Express matches exact static paths before dynamic ones within the same verb, but registering order still matters for two static POST routes. `generate` registered first is safe.

2. **Nested room/seat body injection order** — the `req.body.siteId = req.params.siteId` middleware must execute BEFORE `validate({ body: CreateRoomSchema })`, since the schema requires `siteId` as a UUID. The injection middleware must be listed first in the handler chain.

3. **`PATCH /sessions/:id` vs `PATCH /sessions/:id/cancel`** — these use different HTTP verbs at different specificity levels; Express will route them correctly regardless of registration order. No conflict.

4. **`SnoozeNotificationSchema` transform** — `validate.middleware.ts` reassigns `req.body = result.data` after `safeParse`, so the transform output (`{ snoozedUntil: string }`) correctly replaces whatever the client sent. Controller code unchanged.

5. **`vi.hoisted()` mock additions** — new mock methods (`deleteSeat`, `cancelRegistrationById`, `deleteTemplate`, `deleteDefinition`, `listSchedules`) must be added inside the `vi.hoisted()` call in `setup.ts`, not appended outside it.

6. **`NotificationTemplate` hard-delete is safe** — schema uses `onDelete: SetNull` on both `Notification.templateId` and `OutboundMessage.templateId`, so deleting a template sets those foreign keys to NULL without constraint violations.

You are a senior backend security engineer.
Audit found high-risk object-level authorization and data exposure issues in test-center and messaging flows.

Goal
Close authorization gaps while preserving intended admin/operator workflows and avoiding breaking changes for legitimate access.

Issues to fix
Test-center registration/cancel trusts caller-supplied user identifiers.
Messaging non-admin list scope is over-broad (OR isFailureAlert:false style logic).
Messaging single-message operations (get, delivery update, package download) lack strict ownership checks for non-admins.
Constraints
Non-admin users must only access their own message/registration objects.
Admin/system roles retain broad access.
Preserve existing API signatures where possible; enforce security in service/controller layer.
Keep error semantics consistent (403 vs 404) with existing patterns.
Implementation expectations
For self-service endpoints, derive effective user from session (req.userId) unless role is privileged.
Add centralized ownership checks in messaging service methods.
Tighten query filters for non-admin list endpoints to strict owner scope.
Add unit/API tests for:
User A cannot read/update/download User B resources.
Admin can still access all.
Self-service still works unchanged.
Add concise security notes in code comments and README/security section.
Output format
Security decision table (role → allowed actions).
Changed files + why.
Test evidence (new/updated cases and results).
